---
title: "Methrix"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(methrix)
```

```{r}
hg38_cpgs <- methrix::extract_CPGs(ref_genome = 'BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38')
```

```{r}
bdg_files <- list.files(
  path = 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Processed/files/WI-3791/results/bismark/methylation_calls/methylation_coverage/', 
  #pattern = "*bedGraph\\.gz",
  full.names = T
)
bdg_files[[1]]
length(bdg_files)
```

```{r}
meth <- methrix::read_bedgraphs(files = bdg_files, ref_cpgs = hg38_cpgs, 
                                pipeline = "Bismark_cov", 
                                zero_based = FALSE, stranded = T, collapse_strands = T, 
                                h5 = T, h5temp = "Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/")
```
```{r}
save_HDF5_methrix(meth, 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_raw/', replace=T)
```
